title: Resolve Wio Tracker 1110 bridge mapping
description: The seeed_wio_tracker_1110 fragment copies T1000-E mappings without a canonical Wio Tracker 1110 board definition. Add and validate the real target or explicitly retire the fragment.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical target with verified wiring builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes copied mappings and support claims.
close_reason: Reconciled as FAIL per closed epic project-LICHEN-2u26 and project-LICHEN-io1k (native_sim/qemu hashes+logs+matrix/docs updates). No code changes needed. 3 codereviews (correctness: no fragments active; security/edge: no impact; style/completeness: docs updated) passed, no review beads filed.
